creator: fdan52@comcast.net
text:
I was attempting to install gnome2 after completing a FreeBSD Rel 10 OS installation,
Per instruction from the BSD/gnome wed page, I tried "pkg_add gnome2".  The response was that pkg_add was not installed.

How-To-Repeat: Install BSD Rel 10.0 from BSD home site,
Attempt to use "pkg_add" per documentation for installing GNOME2
